description: Curated subsets of skills for common team roles. Install with: bash lib/install.sh --profile <name>. Use 'full' (default) to install all skills. Each profile keeps profiles-and-credentials (shared reference) automatically.

full.description: All 15 service-integration skills + shared reference. Default if --profile is omitted.

mobile-team.description: Mobile dev/QA: React Native, native iOS/Android release, Maestro E2E, Firebase, xlsx test cases, Slack alerts.

backend-ops.description: Backend dev/SRE: Heroku ops, Postgres queries, Sentry triage, Slack alerts, Shopify (e-commerce backends).

qa-team.description: QA/QC engineers: RSpec, k6 load testing, Maestro mobile E2E, xlsx test cases, Rails security audit.

pm.description: Project managers / team leads: Trello cards, Slack updates, Azure DevOps work items + PRs.

ruby-dev.description: Ruby/Rails developers: RSpec, Rails security, Postgres, Heroku deploy, Sentry monitoring.

devops.description: DevOps/SRE: Heroku, Sentry, Slack, k6 perf testing, Firebase, Azure DevOps pipelines.

ecommerce.description: Shopify-focused: Shopify Admin, Postgres analytics, Sentry, Slack, Heroku.
